title: H&E staining on paraffin sections
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"a7t8e","text":"This protocol describes H\u0026E staining on fly heads paraffin sections for neuronal counting experiments.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"6ldlc","text":"For hazard information and safety warnings, please refer to the SDS (Safety Data Sheet).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Fix fly heads Overnight in 4 %, formalin .
Deparaffinize and bring through ethanols to water (xylene x 2, 100 %, ethanol x 4, tap H 2 O x 2).
Differentiate in acid alcohol ( 1 %, hydrochloric acid in 70 %, alcohol ) – one quick dip.
Blue in tap H 2 O for 00:05:00 or to desired color.
Stain with eosin ( 10 % in 100 %, ethanol ) – one quick dip or to desired color.
Dehydrate through ethanol series and xylenes.
creator: Daniel El Kodsi
